task: D-1 - Search Console And Indexing Evidence Readback

official_sources.title: URL Inspection tool
official_sources.used_for: URL Inspection scope, live test limits, and indexing caveats

official_sources.title: Sitemaps report
official_sources.used_for: Sitemap fetch diagnostics and failure modes

official_sources.title: Page indexing report
official_sources.used_for: Indexing status categories and URL Inspection limitations

official_sources.title: Get started with Search Console
official_sources.used_for: Search Console setup and monitoring context

search_console_envelope.dataset: property ownership, sitemap submission, URL Inspection samples, indexing, canonical, enhancements, manual actions, security issues, performance

scope.property_type: domain property preferred; URL-prefix acceptable as secondary
scope.search_type: web; search appearance and product/image surfaces when available

search_console_envelope.aggregation: property, sitemap, URL, page type, locale, country, device, date, search appearance
limitations: No Search Console property URL, owner, backup owner, OAuth/service-account credential, API credential, or sanitized export was available through the project wrapper or repo evidence.

No sitemap submission status, URL Inspection result, Google-selected canonical, Page indexing status, enhancement report, manual action report, security issue report, HTTPS report, or performance report was read back.
Public production HTTP evidence currently fails the expected robots and sitemap contract, so Search Console readback should be repeated after the production deployment is corrected.

local_gate_results.evidence: src/public contains robots.txt, sitemap.xml, sitemap-products.xml, merchant-products.xml, _headers, and _redirects; source static asset check passed.
Product sitemap check passed: 60918 URLs across 2 file(s).

local_gate_results.command: node -e 'const fs=require("fs"); for (const f of ["src/public/robots.txt","src/public/sitemap.xml","src/public/sitemap-products.xml","src/public/sitemap-products-1.xml","src/public/sitemap-products-2.xml"]) { const s=fs.statSync(f); console.log(f+"|bytes="+s.size); }'
local_gate_results.evidence: Local source files exist with non-zero sizes.

live_asset_results.impact: Search Console and crawlers cannot discover sitemap declarations from production robots.txt.
Primary sitemap submission would fail or report fetch errors.
Product sitemap index is serving the SPA shell instead of XML.
Product child sitemap is serving the SPA shell instead of XML.
Product child sitemap is serving the SPA shell instead of XML.

representative_live_url_results.expected_policy: safe denial, no private UI, noindex/noarchive

findings.title: Search Console authenticated readback unavailable
findings.evidence: Project wrapper has no Search Console property URL, site URL, Google Search Console property metadata, or Google application credentials.
findings.impact: D-1 cannot confirm property ownership, submitted sitemaps, URL Inspection samples, Google-selected canonicals, indexing diagnostics, enhancements, manual actions, security issues, or performance.
findings.verification: Provide verified owner/full-user access or sanitized exports/API readback.

findings.title: Production robots and sitemaps are not served as deployable Search Console assets
findings.evidence: robots.txt and sitemap.xml return 404; product sitemaps return text/html Figma Make shell.
findings.impact: Sitemap submission and Google crawler discovery are unreliable until production host parity is fixed.
findings.verification: Live curl and Search Console Sitemaps report show 200 XML/text responses and successful fetch.

findings.title: Representative invalid/private URLs still return public 200 HTML
findings.evidence: /cms and a random unknown route return 200 text/html on live production.
findings.impact: Search Console Page indexing and URL Inspection may show soft-404, duplicate, or unintended indexability signals until edge route policy is live.
findings.verification: Live invalid/private route samples return safe 404/410 or denial headers with noindex policy.

required_search_console_readback: Property type and canonical host coverage
Submitted sitemap status for robots-declared sitemap.xml and sitemap-products.xml
Representative URL Inspection for homepage, FI service, EN service, product canonical, utility/noindex, invalid route, and legacy/redirect route samples
Google-selected canonical versus user-declared canonical for samples
Page indexing report grouped by page type and reason
Enhancement reports for applicable structured data
HTTPS/Page Experience/Core Web Vitals where available
Search performance by page, query, country, device, date, and search appearance

gate_result.next_required_task: D-2 - Google Business Profile, Citations, And Business Fact Approval

no_guarantee: This D-1 evidence record improves governance and launch readiness. It does not guarantee crawling, indexing, selected canonicals, rankings, rich results, traffic, conversions, revenue, or AI inclusion.
